title: Robiquetia bifida
taxonomy: Robiquetia bifida is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the phylum Ascomycota, class Ascomycetes, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, and genus Robiquetia. The family Orchidaceae is commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Robiquetia belongs to the subfamily Cranichideae. The subfamily Cranichideae is further divided into several tribes, including the tribe Cranichideae. Robiquetia bifida is an orchid species within the vast and diverse orchid family.
